title: OpenSfM v1.0
abstract:
OpenSfM v1.0 is here, and it's a big leap.

The original OpenSfM (github.com/mapillary/opensfm), the Structure-from-Motion engine behind OpenDroneMap and WebODM, is no longer maintained. As former maintainers, we couldn't let it go. So we went back to work, and improved it on ma
abstract_zh: OpenSfM v1.0 已发布，这是一个巨大的进步。原版 OpenSfM（github.com/mapillary/opensfm），作为 OpenDroneMap 和 WebODM 的结构从运动引擎，已不再维护。作为前维护者，我们不能让它消失。所以我们重新开始了工作，并在 main 分支上进行了改进。
